packages.title: Reviewer And Rule Quality
packages.description: Independent OD-023 reviewer delivery, review files, adjudication, and final rule quality evidence.

packages.title: Governance And Legal
packages.description: Hosted GitHub governance and qualified legal approval evidence.

packages.title: npm And VS Code Publication
packages.description: npm package publication, final version, clean install, VS Code publisher, and Marketplace evidence.

packages.title: Production Platform
packages.description: Cloud runtime, database, object storage, API, workers, dashboard, backup, observability, and agency evidence.

packages.title: Live Provider Acceptance
packages.description: Live Google, Yandex, Stripe, notifications, and other provider acceptance evidence.

packages.title: Security Accessibility And Website
packages.description: Manual accessibility, external security review, DAST, pentest, security gate, and public website evidence.

packages.title: Final Release
packages.description: Final RC, git tag, and SearchLint 1.0 publication evidence.
